name: OpenSSF Scorecard: SBOM
description: Check whether the project generates a Software Bill of Materials in SPDX or CycloneDX format. SBOMs provide a machine-readable inventory of all components, enabling automated vulnerability correlation, license compliance auditing, and supply chain transparency.
match: no SBOM generation in release workflow, no SPDX or CycloneDX output detected
replacement: add SBOM generation step to release workflow using syft, cdxgen, or spdx-sbom-generator
